d: French Marxist philosopher. Developed the theory of structural Marxism and made major contributions to debates on ideological state apparatuses, overdetermination, and the epistemological break in Marx's thought.
s: louis althusser french left french marxist philosopher. developed the theory of structural marxism and made major contributions to debates on ideological state apparatuses, overdetermination, and the epistemological break in marx's thought. general criticism philosophy letters political theory economics
